deep_dive.title: PixWorld: Unifying 3D Scene Generation and Reconstruction in Pixel Space
deep_dive.abstract: 3D reconstruction and generation are commonly tackled by separate paradigms: pixel-based regression for reconstruction, and latent diffusion for generation. Recent works attempt to unify them in latent space, but with notable drawbacks: the diffusion objective is defined on latent features rather than the underlying 3D representation, and both branches suffer from information loss introduced by latent encoding, while requiring a pretrained Variational Autoencoder (VAE) or Representation Autoencoder (RAE). In this paper, we reformulate these two tasks under a unified pixel-space diffusion paradigm and introduce PixWorld, a single model that jointly addresses 3D reconstruction and generation. By supervising diffusion directly on rendered images, PixWorld removes the above limitations and aligns optimization with 3D scene fidelity. Beyond photometric and perceptual supervision that operates at the 2D image level and lacks 3D geometric awareness, we further introduce a geometry perception loss that aligns rendered views with their ground truth in the geometry-aware feature space of a pretrained 3D foundation model, providing 3D structural supervision. PixWorld consistently outperforms prior latent-space generation methods and matches state-of-the-art reconstruction methods, demonstrating the superiority of a unified pixel-space approach.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: unifies 3D reconstruction and generation in pixel space
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 在像素空间统一3D重建与生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 在像素空间统一3D重建与生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 在像素空间统一3D重建与生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: PixWorld unifies 3D reconstruction and generation in a single pixel-space diffusion model, supervising diffusion directly on rendered images to avoid latent information loss, enabling both tasks without pretrained VAEs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前3D重建与生成通常采用分离的范式（基于回归或潜在扩散），统一模型受限于潜在空间的信息损失。PixWorld将两者统一于像素空间扩散框架，直接在渲染图像上监督扩散过程，无需预训练VAE。该模型在重建和生成任务上均达到领先效果，消除了潜在编码的瓶颈，为3D内容创建提供了简洁高效的统一解决方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前3D重建与生成通常采用分离的范式（基于回归或潜在扩散），统一模型受限于潜在空间的信息损失。PixWorld将两者统一于像素空间扩散框架，直接在渲染图像上监督扩散过程，无需预训练VAE。该模型在重建和生成任务上均达到领先效果，消除了潜在编码的瓶颈，为3D内容创建提供了简洁高效的统一解决方案。

deep_dive.title: StereoSplat+: Feed-Forward Stereo Gaussian Splatting with Diffusion-Assisted Progressive Inference
deep_dive.abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled high-quality, render-ready scene representations for novel-view synthesis. However, most existing 3DGS pipelines rely on multi-view observations (or non-causal access to future frames) to achieve sufficient coverage, which is often unavailable in on-device robotics and AR settings where sensing is restricted to a single stereo rig. Recovering a high-quality 3DGS scene from one stereo observation, therefore, remains challenging due to occlusions, limited field of view, and missing geometry. We present StereoSplat+, a diffusion-enhanced feed-forward framework that enables causal reconstruction from a single stereo pair. Our method builds on two key components. First, we propose StereoSplat, an input-invariant feed-forward 3D Gaussian estimator that takes a variable number of posed stereo pairs as input and predicts high-quality 3D Gaussians. StereoSplat fuses complementary geometry cues via a cost-volume branch and a triplane-based 3D volume branch and leverages continuous pose encoding to generalize across view counts and camera configurations. Second, since multiple posed stereo pairs are typically unavailable at inference time, we introduce a diffusion-enhanced one-shot progressive inference scheme called StereoSplat+: starting from one stereo pair, we render novel stereo views from the predicted 3DGS, refine them with a one-step diffusion enhancer, and feed them back as additional inputs to update the 3DGS. Experiments on the KITTI-360 dataset show that StereoSplat+ improves novel-view rendering quality and geometry accuracy, especially in occluded regions and under strong view extrapolation, outperforming recent feed-forward 3DGS baselines.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward stereo Gaussian splatting for 3D reconstruction
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈立体高斯泼溅用于3D重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 前馈立体高斯泼溅用于3D重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 前馈立体高斯泼溅用于3D重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: StereoSplat+ proposes a feed-forward framework for 3D Gaussian splatting from a single stereo pair, enabling causal reconstruction for robotics and AR.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D高斯泼溅方法通常依赖多视角观测，在立体视觉受限的场景下难以应用。StereoSplat+提出一种前馈框架，从单次立体观测中实现因果重建，结合扩散辅助渐进推理。该方法在机器人导航和增强现实等设备上具有重要应用价值，填补了实时3D重建领域的空白。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有3D高斯泼溅方法通常依赖多视角观测，在立体视觉受限的场景下难以应用。StereoSplat+提出一种前馈框架，从单次立体观测中实现因果重建，结合扩散辅助渐进推理。该方法在机器人导航和增强现实等设备上具有重要应用价值，填补了实时3D重建领域的空白。

deep_dive.title: Glob3R: Global Structure-from-Motion with 3D Foundation Models
deep_dive.abstract: Recent 3D geometric foundation models, such as VGGT, provide robust feed-forward 3D reconstruction by directly predicting camera poses and 3D scene points from input images. However, their results remain inaccurate, and scaling them to long sequences or large unordered image sets typically requires chunk-wise processing, which can introduce drift and inconsistency. We present Glob3R, a global SfM-style reconstruction built on 3D foundation models. Our key idea is to explicitly optimize feed-forward geometric predictions. To this end, we augment a frozen Pi3X backbone with a lightweight dense matching head that predicts image warps between selected reference frames and neighboring views. These dense warps are converted into sparse but reliable multi-view feature tracks, which provide correspondence constraints for global optimization. We further introduce a keyframe-based sliding-window association strategy that propagates tracks and relative poses across overlapping windows, enabling scalable reconstruction. Finally, we perform global motion averaging and bundle adjustment to refine camera poses, reduce scale inconsistencies, and recover dense scene geometry. Extensive experiments on indoor, outdoor, large-scale driving, and unordered SfM benchmarks demonstrate that Glob3R achieves robust and accurate reconstruction. It consistently improves over feed-forward foundation-model baselines and recent scalable reconstruction methods, while being more robust than classical SfM pipelines. The refined poses also lead to higher-quality neural rendering, validating the benefit of combining foundation-model priors with global geometric optimization. Project page: https://junyuandeng.github.io/Glob3r
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于3D基础模型的前馈3D重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于3D基础模型的前馈3D重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于3D基础模型的前馈3D重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Glob3R augments a frozen 3D foundation model with a dense matching head and explicit optimization to improve feed-forward 3D reconstruction for global SfM.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有前馈3D基础模型在长序列和大规模图像集上存在漂移和不一致性。Glob3R通过冻结Pi3X骨干网络，添加轻量级稠密匹配头来预测图像变形，并将其转换为稀疏而可靠的多视图特征，再通过显式优化提升几何精度。实验表明该方法在全局运动恢复结构（SfM）任务上显著优于纯前馈方法。该工作弥合了前馈预测与全局一致重建之间的差距。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有前馈3D基础模型在长序列和大规模图像集上存在漂移和不一致性。Glob3R通过冻结Pi3X骨干网络，添加轻量级稠密匹配头来预测图像变形，并将其转换为稀疏而可靠的多视图特征，再通过显式优化提升几何精度。实验表明该方法在全局运动恢复结构（SfM）任务上显著优于纯前馈方法。该工作弥合了前馈预测与全局一致重建之间的差距。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to feed forward 3D重建, especially work that connects or combines: feed-forward neural networks for 3D reconstruction; direct mapping from pixels to 3D geometry using feed-forward networks; state of the art feed forward 3D reconstruction methods; feed forward vs optimization based 3D reconstruction; efficient large scale 3D reconstruction models.

deep_dive.title: EditVerse3D: High-Quality 3D Object Editing with Region-Aware Learning
deep_dive.abstract: Local editing of 3D objects remains a long-standing challenge. When interacting with 3D content, humans naturally tend to specify a coarse region of interest for modification rather than defining precise editing boundaries. However, previous methods rely on fully edited 2D images, precise 3D masks, or redundant pipelines, which present a gap. To bridge this gap, we propose EditVerse3D, a novel 3D editing framework that enables high-quality object editing under such coarse guidance. Our approach takes as input a 3D object to be edited, a coarse 3D bounding box indicating the target region, and a reference 2D image describing the desired modification. It produces a coherent, high-fidelity edited 3D object. To facilitate this editing, we introduce a novel region-aware adaptive loss that emphasizes hard-to-learn regions and balances the objective between target and preserved areas. Complementing our loss function, we enhance model robustness and generalization through targeted data augmentations, such as training with scaled 3D masks and filtering out unrealistic editing pairs. We construct a large-scale 3D editing dataset derived from parts information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EditVerse3D achieves superior visual quality and quantitative performance compared to existing 3D editing approaches. Please visit our project page at https://editverse3d.github.io.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: high-quality 3D object editing with region-aware learning
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: EditVerse3D enables local editing of 3D objects from coarse bounding box and reference image, producing coherent high-fidelity results via region-aware learning.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出EditVerse3D框架，解决了粗粗区域指导下768D物体本地编辑的难题。既往方法需要精确的3D匹配或复杂流程，而EditVerse3D只需粗粗3D边框和参考图像即可产生高保真结果。其核心是区域感知学习机制，能够将编辑效果有效定位到目标区域并保持身份一致性。实验表明，该方法在指导精确度、编辑质量和效率上超越了现有方法，为一般用户提供了直觉的编辑体验，推动了3D内容创作的可视化和普及。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出EditVerse3D框架，解决了粗粗区域指导下768D物体本地编辑的难题。既往方法需要精确的3D匹配或复杂流程，而EditVerse3D只需粗粗3D边框和参考图像即可产生高保真结果。其核心是区域感知学习机制，能够将编辑效果有效定位到目标区域并保持身份一致性。实验表明，该方法在指导精确度、编辑质量和效率上超越了现有方法，为一般用户提供了直觉的编辑体验，推动了3D内容创作的可视化和普及。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: state of the art methods for high quality 3D asset generation

deep_dive.title: HSA: Hierarchical Slot Attention for Multi-granularity Scene-Decomposition
deep_dive.abstract: Slot attention is a powerful framework for object-centric learning, decomposing visual scenes into latent slots through iterative competitive attention. However, existing methods share two critical limitations: they decompose scenes into a flat set of slots at a single granularity, and this decomposition is based on appearance rather than semantics. Yet humans understand scenes through semantic hierarchies: separating foreground from background, recognizing object categories, and identifying individual instances. Crucially, such semantic hierarchies cannot emerge without supervision, because category names are human constructs, not visual patterns. We propose Hierarchical Slot Attention (HSA), which learns multi-granularity semantic scene decomposition from a single model. HSA decomposes scenes at three levels: holistic (foreground/background), semantic (object categories), and panoptic (individual instances). Using only 10\% labeled data, combined with hierarchical alignment loss, HSA learns all three levels jointly. We further introduce grouping purity and containment to measure whether the hierarchy is encoded in representation space, not just output masks. Experiments on COCO and PASCAL VOC demonstrate that HSA outperforms the strongest flat baseline by up to \textbf{$+$41.5} ARI at holistic, \textbf{$+$14.6} at semantic, and \textbf{$+$10.4} at panoptic level on COCO, with even larger gains on Pascal VOC, while requiring a single model instead of three. Code will be made available upon acceptance.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: hierarchical slot attention for semantic scene decomposition
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 层次化槽注意力用于语义场景分解
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 层次化槽注意力用于语义场景分解
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 层次化槽注意力用于语义场景分解
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: HSA learns hierarchical semantic scene decomposition by extending slot attention to multiple granularities, enabling extraction of foreground/background, object categories, and instances in a single model.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有槽注意力机制以单一粒度分解场景，且基于外观而非语义，无法提取语义层次。HSA提出层次化槽注意力，通过多层次竞争注意力学习多粒度语义场景分解，无需额外监督即可分离前景背景、识别物体类别和实例。在多个数据集上，HSA显著提升了场景分解的语义一致性和层次结构，为对象级理解提供了新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有槽注意力机制以单一粒度分解场景，且基于外观而非语义，无法提取语义层次。HSA提出层次化槽注意力，通过多层次竞争注意力学习多粒度语义场景分解，无需额外监督即可分离前景背景、识别物体类别和实例。在多个数据集上，HSA显著提升了场景分解的语义一致性和层次结构，为对象级理解提供了新范式。

deep_dive.title: Ortho2CAD: 3D CAD generation from orthographic drawings using vision language models
deep_dive.abstract: Engineering design intent is often communicated through rasterized orthographic drawings. However, downstream workflows inherently require editable and parametrically defined 3D computer-aided design (CAD) models. To bridge this gap, we introduce Ortho2CAD, a vision-language model (VLM) specifically designed to translate rasterized orthographic drawings directly into editable CadQuery code, which can then be seamlessly converted into 3D CAD models. To train the model effectively, we utilize supervised fine-tuning (SFT) for instances where explicit CadQuery code labels already exist, and we apply geometry-grounded reinforcement learning (RL) to optimize the model in scenarios where ground-truth labels are absent. To enable learning at scale, we create a pythonOCC-based drawing generator that renders first-angle orthographic projections from STEP models, complete with dashed hidden lines and key dimensions. On existing datasets encompassing settings both with and without CadQuery supervision, we generate orthographic drawings and show that our model produces 100% syntactically valid code. Moreover, it achieves a 3D CAD intersection-over-union (IoU) accuracy that surpasses all baselines, with an average relative improvement of over 7% compared directly against the next best performing model. We show that leveraging VLMs with SFT and RL techniques can effectively pave the way forward for orthographic drawing to 3D CAD reconstruction. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/AdityaJoglekar/Ortho2CAD.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: generates 3D CAD models from 2D drawings using VLMs, for generative 3D modeling
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用视觉语言模型从二维正射图生成3D CAD模型，属于生成式3D建模
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用视觉语言模型从二维正射图生成3D CAD模型，属于生成式3D建模
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用视觉语言模型从二维正射图生成3D CAD模型，属于生成式3D建模
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Ortho2CAD uses a VLM to translate rasterized orthographic drawings into editable CadQuery code for 3D CAD generation, with SFT and geometry-grounded RL.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 论文提出Ortho2CAD，利用视觉语言模型将光栅化的正射投影图直接转换为可编辑的CadQuery代码，进而生成3D CAD模型。采用监督微调和基于几何的强化学习训练模型，在有无真实代码标签的两种场景下进行优化。该方法实现了从工程图纸到参数化3D模型的自动化转换。

deep_dive.title: CtrlVTON: Controllable Virtual Try-On via Visual-Instance-Prompt Segmentation
deep_dive.abstract: Virtual try-on (VTO) has made significant progress in realistically transferring garments onto a target person. Yet most systems give the user little control over how a garment should be worn -- its size (loose or fitted), style (e.g., tucked in or untucked, open or closed), and spatial placement on the body. We address this gap with two complementary contributions. First, we define and solve Visual-Instance-Prompt Segmentation via VIP-SAM: given a flatlay image of a garment, segment that specific instance in a photograph of a person wearing it. This is an instance-level task, distinct from the typically studied category-level segmentation. Second, we introduce CtrlVTON, a controllable VTO framework that recasts try-on as an image editing problem and adds segmentation masks as pixel-level control over garment layout, including style, size, and spatial placement on the body. VIP-SAM and CtrlVTON each achieve state-of-the-art results on their respective tasks. In particular, CtrlVTON generates images that follow user-provided layouts far more faithfully than the strongest proprietary editing systems while matching them on garment fidelity.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于虚拟试穿的实例分割
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于虚拟试穿的实例分割
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于虚拟试穿的实例分割
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Visual-Instance-Prompt Segmentation (VIP-SAM) for segmenting a specific garment instance from a photo, enabling controllable virtual try-on as an image editing problem.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对虚拟试穿中用户对服装穿着方式控制不足的问题，论文提出了视觉实例提示分割（VIP-SAM）方法，能够从照片中分割出特定服装实例。基于此构建了CtrlVTON框架，将试穿转化为图像编辑问题，实现了对服装尺寸、风格和空间位置的精细控制。实验表明该方法在可控性和保真度上优于现有方案，为虚拟试穿提供了新的交互范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对虚拟试穿中用户对服装穿着方式控制不足的问题，论文提出了视觉实例提示分割（VIP-SAM）方法，能够从照片中分割出特定服装实例。基于此构建了CtrlVTON框架，将试穿转化为图像编辑问题，实现了对服装尺寸、风格和空间位置的精细控制。实验表明该方法在可控性和保真度上优于现有方案，为虚拟试穿提供了新的交互范式。

deep_dive.title: Promptable Concept Segmentation from Above: Evaluating SAM 3's Zero-Shot and One-Shot Capabilities in Remote Sensing
deep_dive.abstract: The deployment of large-scale foundation models, such as the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3), promises a transition toward open-vocabulary, training-free computer vision. However, their capacity to generalize out-of-distribution to the complex, top-down geometric structures of Earth Observation imagery remains largely unquantified. Driven by SAM 3's performance disparities in highly specialized domains, we present a comprehensive, multi-task empirical evaluation across remote sensing scene classification, object detection, and instance segmentation under strict zero-shot and one-shot constraints. To achieve this, we introduce a structural adaptation of SAM 3 by repurposing its decoupled binary presence head into a standalone zero-shot classifier. Furthermore, by systematically isolating textual and visual prompt modalities across five configurations, we explicitly diagnose the alignment mechanics within the model's multimodal decoder. Our findings reveal severe cross-modal interference: while visual prompts successfully align the decoder to complex remote sensing geometry, textual prompts inject misaligned, ground-level semantic bias, actively degrading coordinate regression. To benchmark these capabilities without resource-intensive training, we formulate a novel training-free proxy evaluation protocol for Generalized Zero-Shot tasks (scene classification and instance segmentation). Ultimately, our results demonstrate that SAM 3 avoids the overfitting commonly seen in legacy domain-adapted models, achieving high Harmonic Mean scores in segmentation tasks. However, it remains fundamentally constrained by sub-pixel resolution limits and overhead semantic blind spots, charting a definitive mandate for parameter-efficient geospatial fine-tuning of its multimodal decoder.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Evaluates SAM 3 for zero-shot and one-shot instance segmentation on remote sensing imagery
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 在遥感图像上评估SAM 3的零样本和单样本实例分割能力
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 在遥感图像上评估SAM 3的零样本和单样本实例分割能力
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 在遥感图像上评估SAM 3的零样本和单样本实例分割能力
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper comprehensively evaluates SAM 3's zero-shot and one-shot instance segmentation performance on remote sensing data, adapting its head for the domain.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 大型基础模型如SAM 3在地球观测图像上的泛化能力尚未量化。本文对SAM 3在遥感场景分类、目标检测和实例分割任务上进行了零样本和单样本评估。通过改进其二元存在头结构，实验揭示了SAM 3在复杂俯视几何结构中的性能差异，为实例分割框架在特定领域的应用提供了基准和适应策略。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 大型基础模型如SAM 3在地球观测图像上的泛化能力尚未量化。本文对SAM 3在遥感场景分类、目标检测和实例分割任务上进行了零样本和单样本评估。通过改进其二元存在头结构，实验揭示了SAM 3在复杂俯视几何结构中的性能差异，为实例分割框架在特定领域的应用提供了基准和适应策略。

quick_skim.title: Geometric Reciprocity: Unlocking Self-Supervision for Stereoscopic Video Generation
quick_skim.abstract: Monocular-to-stereo conversion synthesizes stereoscopic content from 2D videos for immersive 3D experiences. In modern Depth-Image-Based Rendering (DIBR) approaches, stereo inpainting of disocclusions is the critical bottleneck. Training-based methods achieve superior quality but rely on scarce stereo pairs or synthetic data with domain gaps. We address this through the first self-supervised framework learning from monocular videos via cycle consistency. Our key contribution is the Geometric Reciprocity Theorem (GRT): under the nearest-neighbor DIBR formulation, the disocclusion mask when synthesizing a target view equals the mask of pixels lost when warping back from target to source, enabling analytical computation of test-time disocclusion masks directly from monocular images. This yields train-test consistency for the stated warping formulation, supporting self-supervised learning from unlimited monocular videos and substantial improvements over training-free and supervised state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://visual-ai.github.io/grt/
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: self-supervised stereoscopic video generation using depth and geometry
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于深度和几何的自督立体视频生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于深度和几何的自督立体视频生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于深度和几何的自督立体视频生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Geometric Reciprocity enables self-supervised learning of stereoscopic video generation from monocular videos using cycle consistency and a new theorem for disocclusion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出几何互恶定理，实现了从单目视频自督立体视频生成，解决了立体图像填补的瓶颈问题。该方法通过循环一致性学习，避免对立体数据的依赖，而定理则提供了解析式的掩码计算方法。实验表明，该方法能生成高质量的立体视频，为沉浸式3D体验提供了新方法。

quick_skim.title: AnythingReality: Robust Online Gaussian Splatting SLAM for Open-Vocabulary VR Scene Exploration
quick_skim.abstract: We present a novel integrated architecture for robust online 3D Gaussian splatting, real-time VR exploration, and speech-driven Vision-Language-Model interaction. Unlike methods assuming clean depth or external poses, our system combines ORB-SLAM3-based pose estimation with online Gaussian reconstruction for noisy real-world data. A VR pipeline enables immersive exploration of incremental reconstructions; a semantic module transcribes voice commands, generates scene descriptions, and records points of interest. Against state-of-the-art online Gaussian splatting methods, we improve image quality on our dataset (+14.5% PSNR, +8.6% SSIM, -14.3% LPIPS) and TUM-RGBD (+11.7% PSNR, +7.8% SSIM, -21.6% LPIPS), with comparable or superior frame rates via quality-speed configurations. We achieve an 88% VLM object-recognition rate.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: AnythingReality combines ORB-SLAM3 with online Gaussian splatting for robust open-vocabulary VR scene exploration, improving reconstruction quality on real-world data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对在线3D高斯泼溅在真实数据中依赖外部位姿的问题，提出集成ORB-SLAM3位姿估计与在线高斯重建的架构。支持VR沉浸式探索和语音交互，在噪声数据上重建质量优于现有方法。为开放词汇场景探索提供了鲁棒且交互性强的解决方案。

quick_skim.title: GaussFusion: Towards Multimodal 3D Gaussian Pretraining
quick_skim.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting provides an explicit representation that jointly models geometry and appearance, serving as a scalable foundation for 3D representation learning. Existing pre-training methods for Gaussian representations, such as masked Gaussian reconstruction, primarily capture local structures but offer limited semantic supervision. In this paper, we propose GaussFusion, a multimodal pre-training framework for 3D Gaussian representations. GaussFusion integrates image and text supervision into masked Gaussian modeling through cross-modal semantic alignment, enabling the Gaussian encoder to learn both visual and language-level semantic information during pre-training. To better adapt masked modeling to the non-uniform distribution of Gaussian primitives, we further propose Gaussian Salience-guided Multi-scale Hole Masking (GSHM). GSHM constructs spatially continuous masked regions based on Gaussian salience. By applying hole masks at multiple scales, GSHM encourages the encoder to capture both fine-grained local patterns and broader structural dependencies. Extensive experiments on downstream tasks demonstrate that GaussFusion improves the transferability of Gaussian representations. Notably, GaussFusion outperforms Gaussian-MAE on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN (PB-T50-RS) by 0.61\% and 3.85\%, respectively.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multimodal 3D Gaussian pretraining for geometry and appearance
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向几何和外观的多模态3D高斯预训练

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes GaussFusion, a multimodal pretraining framework for 3D Gaussian representations that integrates image and text supervision into masked Gaussian modeling via cross-modal semantic alignment, enabling scalable 3D representation learning.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对3D高斯表示预训练缺乏语义监督的问题，论文提出GaussFusion多模态预训练框架。它将图像和文本监督通过跨模态语义对齐融入掩码高斯建模，使高斯编码器同时学习视觉和语言层面的语义信息。在多项下游任务上，该预训练方法显著提升了3D场景理解与生成性能，为3D基础模型提供了可扩展的预训练范式。

quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 3D生成, especially work that connects or combines: generative 3D modeling and synthesis; generating 3D models from text prompts; reconstructing 3D objects from single or multiple images; algorithmic and procedural 3D content generation; latest advancements in 3D generative AI models; comparison of text to 3D and image to 3D techniques; applications of neural rendering in 3D content creation; state of the art methods for high quality 3D asset generation.

quick_skim.title: Decoupled Illumination Priors for Spatially Controllable Multi-View Indoor Scene Relighting
quick_skim.abstract: Indoor scene relighting demands photorealism, precise spatial control, and strict multi-view consistency. While diffusion-based image editing models enable semantic lighting manipulation via text prompts, enforcing exact 3D light placement often disrupts their generative priors. We propose Lume-Palette, a progressive framework that leverages semantic lighting priors for spatially controllable multi-view indoor relighting. The approach decouples relighting into two stages: (1) illumination distillation, which extracts canonical illumination palettes from a pretrained diffusion model to preserve realistic material-light interactions, and (2) illumination casting, which explicitly maps target spatial lighting conditions defined from coarse 3D geometry. To efficiently handle dense multi-view and multi-modal inputs, we introduce an asymmetric multi-view conditioning strategy that selectively injects essential spatial context. Experiments on diverse synthetic scenes and real-world scenes demonstrate that Lume-Palette produces photorealistic, spatially controllable, and multi-view consistent relighting results. Project Page: https://cjeen.github.io/lumepalette
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Leverages generative priors for spatially controllable multi-view indoor relighting, a neural rendering application
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用生成先验实现空间可控的多视角室内重光照，属于神经渲染应用
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用生成先验实现空间可控的多视角室内重光照，属于神经渲染应用

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Lume-Palette decouples indoor relighting into illumination distillation and casting, enabling spatially controllable multi-view consistent edits via diffusion priors.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 室内场景重光照要求真实感、空间可控性和多视角一致性。本文提出Lume-Palette，通过两阶段流程解耦重光照：首先从预训练扩散模型中蒸馏标准光照调色板以保留材质-光照交互，然后显式映射目标空间光照条件。实验表明该方法能实现高质量的空间可控多视角室内重光照，为神经渲染在3D内容创作中的应用提供了新方案。

quick_skim.title: 4D Human-Scene Reconstruction from Low-Overlap Captures
quick_skim.abstract: Existing volumetric capture of dynamic human performance achieves high fidelity with dense camera arrays. However, in real-world scenarios, only a handful of low-overlap cameras are available, which degrades the output quality and leaves large areas unobserved. Recent 4D reconstruction methods have focused on low-overlap settings, yet they still produce noticeable artifacts in under-observed regions. Video diffusion models have emerged as another option, but they show geometrically inconsistent results for humans. To address these limitations, we propose StudioRecon, a pipeline that reconstructs 4D human scenes from sparse, low-overlap cameras by decoupling background and humans. We densify background supervision by synthesizing hundreds of camera-controlled novel views with a video diffusion model. We also robustly initialize deformable Gaussian humans with cross-view identity association and triangulated multi-view keypoint fitting. Finally, our recursive enhancement module with motion-adaptive consistency injection harmonizes the composed output, thereby further avoiding remaining artifacts. We achieve state-of-the-art novel view synthesis across four real-world datasets and demonstrate applications such as novel trajectory rendering and human replacement.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: reconstructing 4D human scenes from sparse low-overlap images using video diffusion models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用视频扩散模型从稀疏低重叠图像重建4D人类场景
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用视频扩散模型从稀疏低重叠图像重建4D人类场景
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用视频扩散模型从稀疏低重叠图像重建4D人类场景
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: StudioRecon reconstructs 4D human scenes from sparse low-overlap cameras by decoupling background and humans, using video diffusion to densify background supervision and producing consistent geometry.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有4D重建方法在低重叠相机设置下会产生严重伪影。StudioRecon将背景与人类解耦，利用视频扩散模型合成数百个相机控制的新视角来稠密化背景监督，从而从稀疏低重叠图像重建出高质量4D人类场景。该方法有效减少了未观测区域的伪影，实现了几何一致的4D重建。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有4D重建方法在低重叠相机设置下会产生严重伪影。StudioRecon将背景与人类解耦，利用视频扩散模型合成数百个相机控制的新视角来稠密化背景监督，从而从稀疏低重叠图像重建出高质量4D人类场景。该方法有效减少了未观测区域的伪影，实现了几何一致的4D重建。

quick_skim.title: Autoregressive latent diffusion for 3D molecule generation
quick_skim.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) molecule generation has been dominated by diffusion models, which achieve strong generation quality but typically require the molecular size to be specified a priori. Recent autoregressive approaches have substantially narrowed the performance gap while naturally supporting variable-length generation and conditioning on partial molecular context. However, balancing unconditional and context-conditioned generation remains challenging. We introduce KRONOS, a latent autoregressive diffusion framework that generates molecules in the latent space of a pre-trained autoencoder, jointly modeling molecular graph topology and geometry, while retaining the flexibility of autoregressive generation. We further introduce a mixed training strategy inspired by Fill-in-the Middle (FIM) paradigm, enabling both unconditional and fragment-conditioned molecular generation within a single left-to-right autoregressive model. Experiments on QM9 and GEOM-Drugs demonstrate that KRONOS achieves leading unconditional generation performance among autoregressive methods, while remaining competitive with diffusion models. Moreover, fragment-conditioned generation is achieved with negligible impact on unconditional generation performance, demonstrating that both generation paradigms can be supported within a single architecture.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: autoregressive latent diffusion for 3D molecule generation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于3D分子生成的自回归潜在扩散
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于3D分子生成的自回归潜在扩散
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于3D分子生成的自回归潜在扩散
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: KRONOS is a latent autoregressive diffusion framework for 3D molecule generation, jointly modeling molecular graph topology and geometry.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 3D分子生成领域长期由扩散模型主导，但需要预先指定分子大小。KRONOS提出一种潜在自回归扩散框架，在预训练自编码器的潜在空间中生成分子，联合建模分子图拓扑和几何结构。通过混合训练策略平衡无条件与上下文条件生成，在生成质量和灵活性上取得良好权衡，为分子设计提供了新工具。

quick_skim.title: What VGGT Knows About Overlap: Probing Geometric Foundation Models for Co-Visibility
quick_skim.abstract: A fundamental challenge in 3D reconstruction and robotic localization is co-visibility: determining which image pairs share overlapping visible surfaces, particularly in scenarios with minimal overlap. We demonstrate that VGGT implicitly encodes co-visibility as an emergent behavior: without any supervision for this task, its internal representations exhibit a clear hierarchical structure mirroring that of large language models, i.e. early layers build a 3D-aware scene representation, while late layers act as dedicated co-visibility reasoners. In particular, we identify layer L17 as a negative anchor that consistently routes non-co-visible pairs for this backbone, regardless of the evaluation setting, providing task-grounded evidence of layer specialization in a geometry-grounded foundation model. Building on this, we introduce Co-VGGT, which freezes VGGT and trains only a lightweight layer-wise mixture-of-experts head (less than 7.5M parameters) to classify co-visibility from RGB alone, treating each layer as a specialized expert whose geometric abstraction is adaptively weighted per input pair. On the Co-VisiON benchmark, Co-VGGT surpasses the human annotation baseline and improves over prior work by more than 25% pairwise and 10% multiview. Pairwise predictions are well-calibrated (ECE=0.030), enabling direct use as edge weights in visibility graphs for downstream SfM and SLAM pipelines without post-hoc correction. Code and data are available.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 探测前馈VGGT在三维重建中的作用
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 探测前馈VGGT在三维重建中的作用
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 探测前馈VGGT在三维重建中的作用
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper probes the VGGT geometric foundation model for co-visibility in 3D reconstruction, revealing emergent hierarchical representations.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文通过分析VGGT几何基础模型，发现其在三维重建任务中隐式编码了共视性信息，呈现出类似大语言模型的层次结构：早期层构建三维感知场景表示，后期层充当专门的共视性推理器。该发现为理解前馈网络在三维重建中的内部机制提供了新的视角，对改进重建算法具有指导意义。
